hero.headlineTop: You don't have a study problem.
hero.subtitle: Upload any PDF or notes — Quibly's AI creates flashcards and quizzes in seconds. Daily streaks and competitive leagues make sure you actually study. Every day.

steps.step1Desc: Focused study sessions with built-in breaks. No scrolling, no distractions — just reps for your brain.
steps.step2Desc: Challenge your friends in weekly and monthly leagues. Rankings, streaks, and bragging rights. Studying alone is over.
steps.step3Desc: Streaks, study hours, sessions completed — your stats tell the real story. Consistency beats talent.

features.card1Desc: AI identifies what matters most in your material and creates flashcards with spaced repetition built in. Less time studying, more time remembering.
features.card2Title: Quizzes that expose your blind spots
features.card2Desc: Automatically generated from your content. Find out what you really know — and what you just think you know — before the exam does.

oneTool.headline: One app. Every subject. Zero excuses.
oneTool.paragraph1: Biology, law, history, engineering — Quibly doesn't care what you study. Upload a PDF, slides, screenshots, or type your notes directly. The AI adapts to any subject and creates personalized study material in seconds.
oneTool.paragraph2: Streaks keep you accountable. Leagues keep you motivated. The only thing left is you showing up.

faq.headline: Got questions? We've got answers.
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before your first streak.
faq.a1: Quibly takes your study material — PDFs, slides, screenshots, or typed notes — and uses AI to generate flashcards and quizzes automatically. You study using spaced repetition and active recall — proven methods that help you remember more in less time.
faq.q2: What file formats can I upload?
faq.a2: PDF, images (JPG/PNG), slides (PPT/PPTX), and typed notes. We're also working on imports from Notion, Google Docs, and Apple Notes.
faq.a3: Streaks track your daily study consistency — study every day to build your streak and see it on a visual calendar. Leagues are competitive rankings where you compete against other students weekly and monthly. It's the push you need to stay consistent.
faq.a4: Yes. The Free plan gives you monthly uploads and flashcard generations to get started — no credit card required. The Pro plan unlocks unlimited uploads, advanced AI features, and priority processing.
faq.a5: Yes! Quibly supports English and Portuguese (BR), and the AI understands and generates content in 50+ languages.
faq.a6: Absolutely. We use end-to-end encryption and follow GDPR and LGPD regulations. Your documents are private and never used to train AI models.
faq.q7: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
faq.a7: Yes, cancel anytime with zero fees. You keep Pro access until the end of your billing cycle.
faq.q8: Is there a file size limit?
faq.a8: Free accounts support files up to 20MB and 50 pages. Pro users get larger uploads with no page limit.
faq.supportText: We're here to help you get the most out of Quibly.

cta.headline: While you're thinking about it, someone else is already studying.
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of students who turned wasted study time into real results. Free to start — your first streak is waiting.
cta.trustLine: Free trial • No credit card required • iOS & Android

footer.tagline: AI-powered study tools that make you unstoppable.
